# NeuralRetail

AI-powered Retail Analytics Platform developed as part of the AMDOCS AI Retail Analytics Project.

## Dataset

* Online Retail II Dataset (UCI/Kaggle)

## Completed

* Data Cleaning & Preprocessing
* Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
* Feature Engineering

## Generated Files

* `data/processed/cleaned_retail.csv`
* `data/processed/feature_store.csv`

## Upcoming Modules

* Customer Segmentation
* Demand Forecasting
* Churn Prediction
* Inventory Optimization
* Revenue & Price Intelligence
* Dashboard Development

## Technologies

Python, Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-Learn, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Streamlit, Git, GitHub.
